full_text:
Zhang Zi (Ziyi) 張咨 (子議)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Zi (張咨), styledZiyi (子議), was born in Yingchuan commandery. A renowned person. He declined to supply Sun Jian and was killed in retaliation. Zhang Zi was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Zhang Zi lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
